title: HyMeKo — Canonical-Hypergraph Infrastructure for Cross-View Consistency in Cyber-Physical Systems
description: Reference implementation, benchmark harness, and 90+ paired-seed result CSVs for the HyMeKo framework paper (IEEE T-SMC: Systems, 2026) and its companion paper on spectral-entropy regularization (IEEE T-SMC: Cybernetics, 2026). Includes the Rust source for the canonical-hypergraph IR, the template-driven emitter dispatchers (URDF, SDF, MJCF, DOT, Gazebo, Mermaid, SysML v2), the PyO3 wheel binding, the WebAssembly browser bundle, the PyTorch backend (`torch_dataflow`), the spectral-entropy regularizer arms (paths A, B, C, E, F, I), the universality benchmark suite, and reproducibility scripts.
